case_number: Criminal Misc. Application No. S-242 of 2025
sections_cited: section 3-4 of Sindh Child Marriage Restraint Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No. S-242 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 20.11.2025 Mr. Shah Nawaz Ali Kunbhar advocate for the applicant a/w applicant. Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon, Additional P.G a/w Mst. Shazia Abid, incharge/ Director Darul Aman, Hyderabad. = It is the case of the applicant that she is maternal aunt of Mst. Nazia, who is confined/kept in Darul Aman, Hyderabad, on the directions of learned concerned Magistrate in F.I.R No. 27/ 2025 for offence under section 3-4 of Sindh Child Marriage Restraint Act, 2013 of P.S Women Umerkot. The applicant has approached this Court by way of filing instant Criminal Miscellaneous application under section 561-A Cr.P.C in order to issue direction to learned Civil Judge and J.M-I, Umerkot to release Mst. Nazia and to allow her to go with the applicant. Today, Mst. Shazia Abid, Incharge/ Director Darul Aman Hyderabad, has appeared and submits copy of statement of Mst. Nazia, wherein she categorically denied to go with the applicant and wants to go with her parents. In view of above, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application has become infructuous, hence same is dismissed with directions to learned concerned Magistrate to decide the issue of custody of Mst. Nazia in accordance with law. JUDGE “Saleem”
